chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 360 of 2018 Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing (Priority) case 1. For orders on office objection/reply at A 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 3035/2018 (stay) Dated 13.03.2024 Mr. Kashif Paracha Advocate for the Appellants Mr. Arif Shujaat M. Beg Advocate for the Respondent.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellants submits that they would make an attempt for disposal of the dispute amongst themselves as all of them are closely relatives. Dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
